summary: Comprehensive testing of Iran Observatory website completed successfully. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all authentication, RSS feed management, AI generation, and article management features working correctly. Frontend UI loads properly with Tehran branding, multi-language support, and complete admin dashboard functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Language dropdown has overlay interception preventing clicks, but dropdown is functional and shows all languages correctly

passed_tests: Home page loads with Tehran hero image and Iran Observatory branding
Language switcher displays EN/FR/FA options with Persian RTL support
Login flow works with admin credentials (admin@iranobservatory.org / IranObs2024!)
Admin dashboard shows correct stats (1 Total, 1 Published, 0 Drafts, 19 Pending)
All admin tabs functional (Dashboard, Articles, RSS Feeds, AI Generate)
RSS feed management with fetch/delete capabilities
AI article generation interface with 19 pending RSS items
RSS feed fetching (20 new items retrieved)
